instruction: The black underline on the variable icon faces the wrong way. Mirror it back.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/variable.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.745 3A23.933 23.933 0 0 0 3 12c0 3.183.62 6.22 1.745 9M19.5 3c.967 2.78 1.5 5.817 1.5 9s-.533 6.22-1.5 9M8.25 8.885l1.444-.89a.75.75 0 0 1 1.105.402l2.402 7.206a.75.75 0 0 0 1.104.401l1.445-.889m-8.25.75.213.09a1.687 1.687 0 0 0 2.062-.617l4.45-6.676a1.688 1.688 0 0 1 2.062-.618l.213.09"/></g>
  <line id="underline" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="112" y1="116" x2="16" y2="116" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/variable.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.745 3A23.933 23.933 0 0 0 3 12c0 3.183.62 6.22 1.745 9M19.5 3c.967 2.78 1.5 5.817 1.5 9s-.533 6.22-1.5 9M8.25 8.885l1.444-.89a.75.75 0 0 1 1.105.402l2.402 7.206a.75.75 0 0 0 1.104.401l1.445-.889m-8.25.75.213.09a1.687 1.687 0 0 0 2.062-.617l4.45-6.676a1.688 1.688 0 0 1 2.062-.618l.213.09"/></g>
  <line id="underline" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="116" x2="112" y2="116" />
</svg>
